firstDialogue:
Detective Rhythm:
Huh? Is she ok?

Detective Rhythm:
Excuse me? Miss? Are you ok?

Dizzy Woman:
They…  will know… his name

Detective Rhythm:
(That phrase is similar to the messages left around in the city.)

Detective Rhythm:
(Maybe she knows something about the disappearances and who’s behind them.)

Detective Rhythm:
Excuse me miss, but do you-

Detective Rhythm:
(I don’t think I’m getting through to her..)

Detective Rhythm:
(Maybe a little music will help.)
You're about to enter a rhythm sequence. Press the arrows keys to hit their respective notes
The more notes you hit, the higher your rank will rise
Get a B rank or higher to pass the sequence
hintDialogue:
???:
ugghhh.. Huh? What happened? Why am I out here in this alley?

Detective Rhythm:
I would also like to know that…

Detective Rhythm:
You seemed to have been under some kind of… mind control?

???:
W-what? And Who are you?

Detective Rhythm:
I am Dectective Rhythm, and I'm here to solve a case of recently missing people.

Detective Rhythm:
You are?

Melody:
I'm Melody

Detective Rhythm:
Well Melody, you were one of the people reported to be missing in the news

Melody:
Wait really, that.. is that even possible?

Detective Rhythm:
Believe me, I know it sounds strange, but I think I may have a lead.

Detective Rhythm:
You mentioned the phrase “They will know his name” while you were dizzy,

Detective Rhythm:
which is very similar to the messages left across the city ever since people started going missing

Detective Rhythm:
So I can only infer that he has something to do with both the disappearances and what happened to you.

Melody:
They will know his name”, that sounds… kinda familiar

Detective Rhythm:
Huh?

Melody:
My head still really fuzzy, but I think I remember hearing someone repeating that to me,

Melody:
and I was in some kind of area filled with loud music

Melody:
Before I ended up here at least…

Detective Rhythm:
Do you know where this area is?

Melody:
Not exactly… but to me it looked like it was underground

Detective Rhythm:
Underground… interesting…

Detective Rhythm:
Do you know what this suspect looked like?

Melody:
No not at all. Sorry.

Detective Rhythm:
Ok, thanks for the info.

Detective Rhythm:
I’ll make sure whoever is doing this will be caught and put to justice

Melody:
Thank you, and good luck Detective Rhythm!
